CREATE TABLE test_values (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT);
SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE value >= 2;
SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE value >= 3;
SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE value >= (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_values);
SELECT t1.value FROM test_values t1 JOIN test_values t2 ON t1.value >= t2.value WHERE t2.value = 2;
SELECT t1.value, t2.value FROM test_values t1, test_values t2 WHERE t1.value >= t2.value AND t1.id != t2.id;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_values) AS max_value, (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_values) AS min_value WHERE max_value >= min_value;
SELECT value + 1 FROM test_values WHERE value >= 2 UNION SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE value = 4;
WITH temp_values AS (SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE value >= 2) SELECT SUM(value) FROM temp_values;
